title: senecio carnosus
intro: Senecio carnosus, also known as the Fleshy Fireweed, is a succulent plant species native to the western parts of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its ability to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and even showing potential in cancer treatment due to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. Senecio carnosus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used to make a poultice for topical application.
